positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a crescent moon nestled within a geometric, abstract archway. Below the moon, a silhouette of a lone, stylized forest tree with flowing branches is depicted against a vibrant gradient sky transitioning from deep indigo to soft lavender. Incorporate subtle, bioluminescent celestial elements like swirling nebula patterns and minimalist constellations that frame the main subject. The overall aesthetic should be neo-art nouveau mixed with geometric minimalist design, utilizing strong, clean lines and high contrast. Use a limited but rich color palette (indigo, lavender, gold, black) suitable for screen printing on fabric. Focus on clean silhouettes and excellent separation of foreground and background elements for maximum print clarity. Central composition, high detail, vector art style, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, typography, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, oversaturated, amateur, messy, messy details
